free_text: Giant dipole resonance in N = 82 nuclei.
Absolute cross sections were determined with +/- 15 mb
dates are  corrected  from  two   to   four   digits
including that in reference and history,
data units  are  changed  from MeV to MB in L0024014
REFERENCE, FACILITY, INC-SOURCE, converted to lower
MeV for Ba138 and Ba137 isotopes.
thresholds of (gamma,2n+p) reaction are about 24 MeV
and 13.4 MeV for Nd142, Nd144, and Nd143 isotopes.
